com.rscja.deviceapi

Class RFIDWithISO15693

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.rscja.deviceapi.RFIDWithISO15693
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IRFIDWithHFBase, IRFIDWithISO15693

    public class RFIDWithISO15693
extends java.lang.Object
implements IRFIDWithISO15693
    高频15693协议操作API

    注意事项:
    1. App工程需要导入jna-5.4.0.jar 和 jna-platform-5.4.0.jar
    The App project needs to import jna-5.4.0.jar and jna-platform-5.4.0.jar
    windows系统注意事项:
    2. 需要依赖,UHFAPI.dll，将这两个文件保存到程序根目录。也可以通过调用setDllOrSOFilePath函数来设置要加载的dll路径。
    2. Need to depend on, UHFAPI.dll, save these two files to the program root directory. You can also set the dll path to load by calling the setDllOrSOFilePath function.
    Linux系统注意事项:
    2.需要依赖 libTagReader.so ，将这个文件保存到命令行根目录。也可以通过调用setDllOrSOFilePath函数来设置要加载的so路径
    2. Need to depend on, libTagReader.so, save these two files to the program root directory. You can also set the so path to load by calling the setDllOrSOFilePath function.


    Example Usage:
    public void HF15693Test(){
      RFIDWithISO15693 rfid15693 = RFIDWithISO15693.getInstance();
      rfid15693.connect();
     
      HF15693RequestEntity entity =rfid15693.request15693();
      if (entity == null) {
       //Card not found!
       return;
      }
      //**************Read\Write********************************
      int block ;//0-27
      byte[] data = rfid15693.read(entity, block);
      if(data==null){
       //read fail
      }
      boolean result=rfid15693.write(entity, block, writedata);
      if(!result){
       //write fail
      }
      //**********************************************
      rfid15693.disconnect();
    }

    • Method Detail

      • getInstance

        public static RFIDWithISO15693 getInstance()
        获取UHF操作实例
        Acquire UHF operation Instance
        Returns:
        RFIDWithISO15693

      • connect

        public boolean connect()
        连接读写器(Connect to the reader)
        Specified by:
        connect in interface IRFIDWithHFBase
        Returns:
        true:success false:fail

      • request15693

        public HF15693RequestEntity request15693()
        寻卡(Search card)
        Specified by:
        request15693 in interface IRFIDWithISO15693
        Returns:
        success will return HF15693RequestEntity data, failure will return null.

      • read

        public byte[] read(HF15693RequestEntity entity,
                   int block)
        读卡(Read card)
        Specified by:
        read in interface IRFIDWithISO15693
        Parameters:
        entity - HF15693RequestEntity
        block - 数据块0~27 (the cBlock of card, value 0~27 )
        Returns:
        success will return data, failure will return null.

      • write

        public boolean write(HF15693RequestEntity entity,
                     int block,
                     byte[] pszData)
        写卡(Write card)
        Specified by:
        write in interface IRFIDWithISO15693
        Parameters:
        entity - HF15693RequestEntity
        block - 数据块0~27 (the cBlock of card, value 0~27 )
        pszData - 四个字节的数据(4 bytes Block data)
        Returns:
        true:success false:fail

      • writeAFI

        public boolean writeAFI(HF15693RequestEntity entity,
                        byte afi)
        写入AFI(Write AFi)
        Specified by:
        writeAFI in interface IRFIDWithISO15693
        Parameters:
        entity - HF15693RequestEntity
        afi - AFI值(AFI value)

        public boolean lockAFI()
        锁定AFI(lock AFI)
        Specified by:

        Returns:

      • lockDsfid

        public boolean lockDsfid()
        锁定Dsfid(lock Dsfid)
        Specified by:

      • disconnect

        public void disconnect()
        断开连接(disconnect)
        Specified by:
        disconnect in interface IRFIDWithHFBase

      • setDllOrSOFilePath

        public void setDllOrSOFilePath(java.lang.String directory,
                               java.lang.String fileName)
        设置加载的dll文件路径
        Parameters:
        directory - dll文件目录,如果文件目录为null，将采用可运行的jar文件执行路径
        fileName - dll文件名称，如果文件名为null，将使用默认文件名UHFAPI.dll 备注:如果需要使用此函数，请在调用init函数之前调用此函数。
